title: Pudding’s Betrayal Is Revealed
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Luffy, Nami, Reiju, Pudding, Sanji as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We can't stop straw hat Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How fast is this guy?! Where the hell'd he go?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What was that for?! I'm in a hurry here!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: You're looking for Sanji, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was here till but a moment ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: She said she's gonna kill him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah! are you okay?! did you get hurt?!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: As for pudding... my little brother knows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What?! He knew about all this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No. He learned about it just now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I tried to convince him to just run from here, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji's hung up on the hostages in East Blue and you all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He doesn't want you to be harmed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those Hostages, they're the people on the baratie, right?! I know them too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they're really in danger, I'll even go to east blue if I have to! I'll save 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Would you like something to eat?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I have been looking for a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Every- thing besides that's already been done...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Our promised place is not here!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 49 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
